name: FlareSolverr
description: Launches and manages a local FlareSolverr instance and its sessions, so other extensions can fetch from Cloudflare-protected sites (e.g. animepahe).
author: aquaryuo

networkAccess.reasoning: Talks to the local FlareSolverr HTTP API (default port 8191) to create/list/destroy sessions and check status.

commandScopes.description: Start, stop, and create the local FlareSolverr container.
